name: Bombay Rayon Fashions Limited
summary: Bombay Rayon Fashions Limited, an integrated textile company, manufactures and sells yarn, fabrics, and garments in India. The company also manufactures apparel; and polyester buttons for shirts, coats, outer wear, and trousers, as well as fancy buttons. In addition, it engages in the wholesale, retail, marketing, and distribution of clothing products. Bombay Rayon Fashions Limited also exports its products. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
